title: Wobble Wump Whirl
poem_text:
Dibble dap the jiggly jar,
Wobble wump the twirly star.
Fizzle flop the bouncy bee,
Zippy zing the tickly tree.
Snickery snap the giggle glow,
Tumble tum the wibbly woe.
Pip the pop and snuggle deep,
Dream the wibble-wobble sleep.
cover_context: A swirling night sky filled with glowing, wobbly stars and a giggling bee bouncing on a tickly tree branch.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, ukulele and soft bongos, 111 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
